# AI Builder Day

> Utah's biggest AI event. Two days of learning, building, and launching. Friday, May 8 is for learning (speakers, workshops, AI-for-beginners sessions). Saturday, May 9 is the AI Builder Day Hackathon with $25K+ in bounties and prizes. Produced by JustBuild in partnership with the Utah Governor's Office of Economic Opportunity.

## Event Details

- **Dates:** May 8–9, 2026
- **Location:** Draper, UT (exact venue announced soon)
- **Cost:** Free
- **Audience:** Engineers, designers, students, business owners, first-timers — anyone curious about AI
- **Website:** https://aibuilderday.com
- **Contact:** hello@justbuild.ing
- **Register:** https://lu.ma/justbuild

## Day 1 — Friday, May 8 (Learn)

- 9:00 AM — Doors open, check-in, breakfast
- 10:00 AM — Opening keynote: state of AI in Utah
- 11:00 AM — AI for Beginners workshop
- 12:30 PM — Lunch & sponsor expo
- 1:30 PM — Workshop tracks (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)
- 4:00 PM — Sponsor demos
- 5:30 PM — Networking reception

## Day 2 — Saturday, May 9 (AI Builder Day Hackathon)

- 9:00 AM — Breakfast & team formation
- 10:00 AM — Hackathon kickoff, bounty announcements
- 11:00 AM — Build session begins (mentors on-site)
- 12:30 PM — Lunch
- 2:00 PM — Mentor office hours
- 5:00 PM — Code freeze
- 5:30 PM — Project demos & judging
- 7:00 PM — Awards ceremony

## Sponsorship Tiers

- **Base Sponsor — $2,500:** Logo placement, Friday kickoff pitch, recruiting access, swag distribution
- **Bounty Sponsor — $5,000:** Everything in Base, plus design a custom hackathon bounty with real business problem & data, dedicated judging seat, first right of refusal to hire winning team
- **Headline Sponsor — $10,000:** Everything in Bounty, plus Friday keynote slot, top logo placement, named workshop track, dedicated email shoutouts

Custom packages available: venue, food & beverage, university scholarship sponsorship.

## About JustBuild

JustBuild is Utah's premier AI community on a mission to make Utah AI-native. 400+ engineers, founders, and builders. We host hackathons, coworking sessions, and events trusted by Cerebras, Manus, Windsurf, Bolt, Contrary, Runpod, Mastra, and others. Past events have led to 12+ hires.
